text:
After hacking with symlinks 
to get libjtoolbar and libjtree
to build and install
codecrusader still fails build.
something about can't find xpms and undeclared functions. :(

Fix: 

This thing is EVIL. Call a priest?
I give up.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/devel
cd codecrusader
make
